key.name: pipeline-configures
key.default: [ ( "hwenc-cuda-h264-nvenc", "cudaupload ! cudaconvert", "cudaupload ! cudaconvertscale", "nvh264enc ! queue ! h264parse", "avenc_aac ! queue", "mp4mux fragment-duration=500 fragment-mode=first-moov-then-finalise", "mp4" ), ( "hwenc-gl-h264-nvenc", "cudaupload", "glupload ! glcolorconvert ! glcolorscale", "nvh264enc ! queue ! h264parse", "avenc_aac ! queue", "mp4mux fragment-duration=500 fragment-mode=first-moov-then-finalise", "mp4" ), ( "hwenc-dmabuf-h264-vaapi-lp", "vapostproc", "vapostproc", "vah264lpenc ! queue ! h264parse", "avenc_aac ! queue", "mp4mux fragment-duration=500 fragment-mode=first-moov-then-finalise", "mp4" ), ( "hwenc-dmabuf-h264-vaapi", "vapostproc", "vapostproc", "vah264enc ! queue ! h264parse", "avenc_aac ! queue", "mp4mux fragment-duration=500 fragment-mode=first-moov-then-finalise", "mp4" ), ( "swenc-dmabuf-h264-openh264", "glupload ! glcolorconvert ! gldownload ! queue", "glupload ! glcolorconvert ! glcolorscale ! glcolorconvert ! gldownload ! queue", "openh264enc deblocking=off background-detection=false complexity=low adaptive-quantization=false qp-max=26 qp-min=26 multi-thread=%T slice-mode=auto ! queue ! h264parse", "avenc_aac ! queue", "mp4mux fragment-duration=500 fragment-mode=first-moov-then-finalise", "mp4" ), ( "swenc-memfd-h264-openh264", "videoconvert chroma-mode=none dither=none matrix-mode=output-only n-threads=%T ! videoscale ! queue", "videoconvert chroma-mode=none dither=none matrix-mode=output-only n-threads=%T ! videoscale ! queue", "openh264enc deblocking=off background-detection=false complexity=low adaptive-quantization=false qp-max=26 qp-min=26 multi-thread=%T slice-mode=auto ! queue ! h264parse", "avenc_aac ! queue", "mp4mux fragment-duration=500 fragment-mode=first-moov-then-finalise", "mp4" ), ( "swenc-dmabuf-vp8-vp8enc", "glupload ! glcolorconvert ! gldownload ! queue", "glupload ! glcolorconvert ! glcolorscale ! glcolorconvert ! gldownload ! queue", "vp8enc cpu-used=16 max-quantizer=17 deadline=1 keyframe-mode=disabled threads=%T static-threshold=1000 buffer-size=20000 ! queue", "vorbisenc ! queue", "webmmux", "webm" ), ( "swenc-memfd-vp8-vp8enc", "videoconvert chroma-mode=none dither=none matrix-mode=output-only n-threads=%T ! videoscale ! queue", "videoconvert chroma-mode=none dither=none matrix-mode=output-only n-threads=%T ! videoscale ! queue", "vp8enc cpu-used=16 max-quantizer=17 deadline=1 keyframe-mode=disabled threads=%T static-threshold=1000 buffer-size=20000 ! queue", "vorbisenc ! queue", "webmmux", "webm" ) ]
key.description:
Pipeline configures to use. Configures are tried in order.
[ (name, video preparation, video preparation resizing, video encoding, audio encoding, muxer, file extension), ... ]
